tagline: A 3-agent system built to run a business and compound learning daily.

agents.name: BarleyBot
agents.description: Main agent. Handles daily ops, memory, coordination, and anything that doesn't need specialist depth. Named after Siva's dog Barley.

agents.name: Coffee
agents.description: Deep research specialist. Bound to a dedicated Telegram group. Ask anything — web research, comparisons, summaries, market analysis.

agents.name: Coder
agents.description: Heavy-lifting coding agent. Spawned for complex builds, refactors, and multi-file work. Uses the most capable model available.

automations.name: Podcast Digest
automations.description: Scans 81 podcast feeds, surfaces new episodes, picks the 3 most relevant for the day.

automations.name: RSS Digest
automations.description: Scans 13 RSS feeds across AI, ops, and business. Surfaces new articles since last check.

automations.name: Daily Wrap + LinkedIn Drafts
automations.description: Reads today's memory and GitHub commits. Writes a tech-led log entry to siva-builds. Drafts 2 LinkedIn posts. Triggers Vercel rebuild so this site updates automatically.
automations.output: siva-builds commit + Vercel deploy + Telegram summary

automations.name: Daily OpenClaw Idea
automations.description: Generates one concrete OpenClaw automation idea based on current projects and context.

memory.description: Active conversation memory. Ephemeral — lives only during the session.
Raw notes written during and after each session. What was discussed, built, decided.
Curated and distilled. Updated during heartbeats. The stuff that matters across weeks and months.

integrations.name: Telegram
integrations.use: Primary interface — DM + research group + future coding group

integrations.name: GitHub
integrations.use: Read all private repos. Write to siva-builds and siva-proof-of-work.

integrations.name: Vercel
integrations.use: Auto-deploy this site on every siva-builds push via deploy hook.

integrations.name: Gemini 2.5 Flash
integrations.use: Gateway web search provider for sub-agents.

integrations.name: Tavily
integrations.use: Deep web search in main BarleyBot session.

skills.name: deep-research
skills.description: Multi-source research with structured output. Saves to workspace/research/[topic]/.

skills.name: podcast-digest
skills.description: Fetches 81 podcast feeds, filters new episodes, picks the day's best.

skills.name: coding-agent
skills.description: Delegates complex builds to Coder via background process.

skills.name: obsidian
skills.description: Read and write to Obsidian vaults via obsidian-cli.

skills.name: github
skills.description: GitHub operations — issues, PRs, CI, code review via gh CLI.

companions.name: WalletBot
companions.description: Two-person family finance bot. Natural language expense logging — 'Zomato 850' is all you need. Claude classifies to 13 buckets. Dashboard for trends and goals.
companions.note: Not an OpenClaw agent — independent Telegraf.js bot deployed on Vercel.

companions.name: HealthBot
companions.description: Personal health coach agent. Tracks a 100-day program — training adherence, sleep, Whoop data interpretation, craving accountability. Reads structured program and memory files. No health data stored in the public stack.
companions.note: OpenClaw agent bound to a private group. Persona: Coach — not BarleyBot.
